title: Fix Resend Invitation Email Error
story: As a product administrator, I want the resend invitation email function to work without errors, so that I can re-invite users who did not receive or act on their original invitation.
description: Bug fix for an error that occurred when attempting to resend an invitation email to a pending user. The resend endpoint (`/teams/members/resend/{id}`) was throwing a server error, preventing administrators from re-sending invitations.
acceptance_criteria: Resend invitation email function completes without error
Invited user receives the re-sent invitation email
The resend action is available for pending invitations
middleware_changes: Fixed the resend invitation endpoint to properly handle the re-send logic without throwing a server error.
implementation_notes: The specific error was related to the resend route handler. Fixed and deployed.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the issue was fixed.
